scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:backend: echo Backend disabled - camera handled by camera_server.js on port 8765
scripts.dev:electron: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& wait-on http://localhost:5173 --timeout 60000 --interval 1000 && npx electron electron/main.js
